creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

I noticed that version 0.6.2 is now out.

While working on this I also fixed a few more things. Attaching a patch 
with the following changes:

- Update to 0.6.2
- fixed master site (your patch still looked in 0.5 directory)
- Use DATADIR macro
- Remove share/applications directory if empty

can you test and approve this? Thanks!

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
